title: Koanophyllon breviflorum
intro: Koanophyllon breviflorum, also known as the Short-flowered Koanophyllon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to tropical America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, which may aid in the treatment of various conditions, including wounds, infections, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Koanophyllon breviflorum include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to make various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
